why: Protocol 775 Configuration keep_alive runtime-send helper must send the official Configuration serverbound keep_alive frame. The official expected frame source is the existing generated answer oracle/answers/775/configuration_keepalive_framed_dispatch.answer.jsonl.
what: The exact runtime-send oracle test fails because packet::send_keep_alive panics in Configuration state while translating a Play keep_alive packet family for protocol 775, before a complete keep_alive frame reaches the localhost TcpListener.
stop_condition: The exact runtime-send oracle test passes without editing oracle expected-answer artifacts; if the jar-backed runner is also run, do not require it to discover oracle/*/775/runtime manifests until runner support is explicitly added.
